subject: CLEAN/GO - WS1.6 vocab prep review
body: CLEAN/GO for planning-prep usefulness; this is not a GO to implement before owner decisions. Read-only review only: no edits, no claim, no git/index activity. Findings: the note is explicitly planning-only and avoids namespace/registry decisions; its scope keeps graph-core/vocab as substrate and keeps Oak-specific ingestion, mapping, and graph construction in graph-corpus-sdk or other consumers; the controlled-vocabulary inventory covers RDF/RDFS/OWL/SKOS/SHACL/PROV/DCMI/schema.org, Oak ontology IRIs, generated API/bulk controlled values, source-derived grouping values, and EEF concepts only with owner-approved authority; the open questions cover source authority, SKOS ConceptScheme identity, namespace policy, hierarchy depth, JSON-LD alias split, datatype helper policy, reverse lookup, versioning, and EEF scope; reviewer flags match the relevant type/fred/assumptions/test concerns from graph-stack; and the file is in the right active graph-stack plan area. Guardrail for Dim/next implementer: owner decisions listed at the bottom remain real preconditions; starting registry implementation without them would turn this into COMMENTS.
